caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is centered against a solid black background. She wears a light green tunic featuring a decorated neckline and small floral patterns, and she has a dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. In the bottom-left corner of each frame, a circular logo appears next to the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, and her facial expressions and mouth movements shift slightly as she talks. Her gaze remains directed toward the camera, and her position remains steady. The setting is a minimalist studio environment with no other visible objects or people. The scene remains consistent across the frames, with only the subtle changes in her speech and facial expressions indicating the passage of time.
